---
title: "affine_matrix_to_params"
generated: true
description: "Recover geometric parameters from an affine matrix."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.affine`](../nitrix-geometry-affine.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:affine_matrix_to_params -->
```python
affine_matrix_to_params(mat: Float[Array, '... d d1'], *, deg: bool = True) -> Float[Array, '... p']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:affine_matrix_to_params -->
Recover geometric parameters from an affine matrix.

Inverse of [`params_to_affine_matrix`](../nitrix-geometry-affine/params_to_affine_matrix.qmd).  The linear block is
factored into rotation, scale, and shear via the Cholesky of
$m^{\top} m$ (an RQ-style decomposition); the scale sign is fixed
up with the determinant so a negative-determinant (reflection) matrix is
representable.  The dimensionality is inferred as `mat.shape[-1] - 1`,
so both the `(..., d, d+1)` and square `(..., d+1, d+1)` forms are
accepted.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:affine_matrix_to_params -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `mat` | `Float` | `...` × `d` × `d1` | — | Batched affine matrices in `(..., ndim, ndim+1)` form (or square `(..., ndim+1, ndim+1)`). |
| `deg` | `bool` | — | `True` | If `True` (the default), the returned rotation parameters are in degrees; if `False`, in radians. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...` × `p`. Batched parameter vectors laid out as translation (`ndim`), rotation (`ndim(ndim-1)/2`), scale (`ndim`), and shear (`ndim(ndim-1)/2`), matching the convention of [`params_to_affine_matrix`](../nitrix-geometry-affine/params_to_affine_matrix.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:affine_matrix_to_params -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
| `d1` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
